title: The Girl He Didn't Buy
writer: Ada McQuillan, Gladys Gordon, Gardner Bradford
actors: Pauline Garon, Allan Simpson, Rosemary Cooper
plot: Philip D'Arcy (William Eugene), the financial backer of a Broadway show offers to star Ruth Montaige (Pauline Garon), in the show but he has another reason for doing so. But Ruth, dumb but pure, agrees to marry him after one year,...
